title: Composition reduction literary updating and the duty of the priesthood to keep the covenant dealings of Yahweh memorialized and in the local contemporaneous memory
body:
- what about source criticism, the compilation of multiple sources, the updating and rearranging of actual memorialized events into a larger composition at a later date
- literary dependence on other sources
